 TSI{0,1,2,3,5} are private tables used by Microsoft Visual TrueType (VTT)
tool to store its hinting source data.
TSI3 contains the text of the glyph programs in the form of 'VTTTalk' code.
print_function
division
absolute_import)
ttLibZ
TSI1c

TSI2N)
